title: Horizontal: Glider
description:
Exploration on foot is slow. A §lGlider§r gives you a massive mobility boost.

Craft one with wood, leather (or phantom membrane), and some string. You can deploy it mid-air to glide long distances.

This is especially useful for:
• Exploring the §lTectonic§r mountain ranges
• Scouting for copper and andesite deposits
• Avoiding fall damage while building

Later, you can upgrade to reinforced gliders and eventually a §lCreate Jetpack§r.
